metadata.notes: v1 is not overwritten; Q14 excludes the unsupported SegmentAnyBone premise; Q16 preserves the formula as one atomic fact.

questions.question: 在 BraTS 類 3D 腦腫瘤分割場景，資料少且 GPU 資源受限時，SwinUNETR、MedNeXt、nnMamba 應如何取捨？
questions.ground_truth: 首選 MedNeXt、次選 nnMamba、不優先 SwinUNETR；這是跨文獻相對建議，不是同配置排名。

atomic_facts.text: SwinUNETR uses shifted-window attention, MedNeXt large-kernel 3D CNNs, and nnMamba CNNs with state-space modeling.
The qualified limited-resource recommendation is MedNeXt first and nnMamba second.
This is not an apples-to-apples benchmark ranking.

questions.question: 從 MedSAM、SAM-Med3D 到 MedSAM-2，3D 空間建模與 prompt 需求如何演進？
questions.ground_truth: MedSAM 是 slice-based 2D；SAM-Med3D 是 native 3D；MedSAM-2 以記憶式序列傳播降低後續提示需求。表現只能作方向性比較。

atomic_facts.text: MedSAM applies a promptable 2D approach to volumes slice by slice.
SAM-Med3D is native 3D and MedSAM-2 propagates with memory from an initial prompt.
Cross-paper performance is a directional trend, not a universal Dice ranking.

questions.question: MedSAM-2 的 one-prompt 與對初始 prompt 品質的高度依賴是否互斥？
questions.ground_truth: 不互斥：one-prompt 是低互動次數，初始化誤差仍可能由 memory attention 與 mask propagation 延續。

atomic_facts.text: One-prompt segmentation is one initial prompt followed by automatic propagation.
An inaccurate initial prompt can propagate errors through the sequence.
Low interaction count is not low initialization sensitivity.

expected_evidence.locator: one-prompt segmentation and memory attention method

questions.question: 結合 Params 與 FLOPs，Mamba 是否具當前 3D 醫療分割最高計算效率？
questions.ground_truth: 不成立。線性複雜度不等於最低實際成本；EfficientMedNeXt-L 報告 2.19M parameters 與 57.68G FLOPs。

atomic_facts.text: Mamba linear complexity does not prove the lowest realized Params or FLOPs.
EfficientMedNeXt-L reports 2.19M parameters and 57.68G FLOPs.
The conclusion is a qualified cross-paper comparison.

questions.question: 重建 nnMamba MICCSS 中 CSS 的特徵融合流程與翻轉分支。
questions.ground_truth: CSS takes xflat=[B,L,C], applies shared SiamSSM to Original and three flip branches, restores and sums them, then averages by 1/4.

atomic_facts.text: Algorithm 1 defines xflat with shape [B,L,C].
CSS has Original plus Length, Channel, and Length+Channel flipped shared-SiamSSM branches.
The four restored branches are summed and multiplied by 1/4.

questions.question: 比較 U-Mamba 與 Weak-Mamba-UNet 的模型角色與監督機制。
questions.ground_truth: U-Mamba 是單一 backbone；Weak-Mamba-UNet 是 scribble-supervised three-view framework，透過 partial CE 與 pseudo-label Dice supervision 擴大稀疏訊號。

atomic_facts.text: U-Mamba is a single segmentation backbone with Mamba placement variants.
Weak-Mamba-UNet has UNet, SwinUNet, and Mamba-UNet scribble-supervision branches.
It combines partial cross-entropy with pseudo-label Dice supervision.

questions.question: SAMed、MedSAM、SAM-Med2D、SAM-Med3D 中，哪一個能語義遮罩且 prompt-free？
questions.ground_truth: 唯一答案為 SAMed：其產生 semantic masks 並微調 default embedding；其他三者仍是 prompt-based。

atomic_facts.text: SAMed uniquely outputs semantic class masks.
SAMed tunes the default embedding for prompt-free inference.
MedSAM, SAM-Med2D, and SAM-Med3D remain prompt-based.

expected_evidence.locator: decoder adaptation and prompt-free inference method

questions.question: 少量 dense masks 加大量 unlabeled images 且需 pair of projectors 時，三個 Mamba 方法應選哪個？
questions.ground_truth: 選 Semi-Mamba-UNet：它有 labeled/unlabeled sets、pixel-level cross-supervision 與 pair-of-projectors contrastive learning。

atomic_facts.text: Semi-Mamba-UNet is the semi-supervised choice for labeled and unlabeled data.
It uses a pair of projectors for pixel-level contrastive learning.
Weak-Mamba-UNet is scribble weak supervision and U-Mamba is supervised.

questions.question: 在 3D 醫學影像分割，SwinUNETR 和 nnU-Net 哪個表現更好？
questions.ground_truth: 限定性基線答案是 nnU-Net 在廣泛評估通常較強且穩定；SwinUNETR 可在特定資料集領先，但不是通用勝者。

atomic_facts.text: nnU-Net is generally stronger and more stable in broad comparative evaluation.
SwinUNETR can lead on particular datasets but not universally.
Architecture advantages must be separated from benchmark scope.

questions.question: nnU-Net Revisited 的 SOTA recipe 是什麼，No-Mamba Base 如何裁決 U-Mamba？
questions.ground_truth: 三要素是 CNN U-Net、nnU-Net framework、model scaling；No-Mamba Base 指出增益來自 residual U-Net，而非 Mamba layer。

atomic_facts.text: The recipe includes CNN-based U-Nets, nnU-Net configuration, and model scaling.
No-Mamba Base attributes the apparent gain to the residual U-Net rather than Mamba layers.
The conclusion is tied to the stated ablation baseline.

expected_evidence.locator: recipe discussion and No-Mamba Base ablation

questions.question: Weak-Mamba-UNet 與 Semi-Mamba-UNet 是否能唯一決定誰最先用 Mamba 做有限標註分割？
questions.ground_truth: 不能唯一決定：前者是 scribble-based scope，後者是 limited-annotation semi-supervised scope。

atomic_facts.text: Weak-Mamba-UNet's first-claim scope is scribble-based segmentation.
Semi-Mamba-UNet's first-claim scope is limited-annotation semi-supervised segmentation.
Different scopes prevent a unique overall first claim.

questions.question: 「Semi-Mamba-UNet 是第一篇在任何有限標註場景使用 Mamba 的研究」能被附檔支持嗎？
questions.ground_truth: 不能。這將 Semi-Mamba-UNet 的 limited-annotation/semi-supervised scope 過度泛化，且忽略 Weak-Mamba-UNet 的 scribble scope。

atomic_facts.text: The statement is an unsupported overgeneralization.
Semi-Mamba-UNet is scoped to limited annotations and semi-supervision, not every limited-label setting.
Weak-Mamba-UNet has a distinct scribble-based scope.

questions.question: 在 nnFormer 與 U-Mamba 中，誰有量化 ensemble 證據，誰只有公平比較？
questions.ground_truth: A=nnFormer，B=U-Mamba；nnFormer 有 averaging/ensemble 提升證據，U-Mamba 未提供該證據。

atomic_facts.text: nnFormer reports quantitative averaging or ensemble improvement with nnU-Net.
U-Mamba provides fair comparisons but no ensemble-improvement evidence.
The classification is restricted to those two papers.

questions.question: SAM、SegmentAnyBone、SegVol 是否能放在同一條技術脈絡理解？
questions.ground_truth: 只能回答 SegVol 的已收錄能力。frozen scope 沒有原始 SAM 或 SegmentAnyBone source，因此不能驗證所宣稱的跨文獻技術脈絡、MRI bone 或雙模式內容。

atomic_facts.text: SegVol is a 3D foundation segmentation model with spatial, semantic, multi-prompt support and zoom-out-zoom-in inference.
The frozen source scope has insufficient evidence for original SAM and SegmentAnyBone claims, including MRI-bone and dual-mode assertions.
A SAM-to-SegVol lineage cannot be verified from the frozen source scope.

expected_evidence.locator: frozen source scope secondary medical-SAM document

questions.question: Polyp-SAM Figure 1(b) 的 CVC-ClinicDB mIoU、相對 (a) 的提升及 effective batch size 是多少？
questions.ground_truth: (b) 為 0.877，(a) 為 0.837，提升 0.040；effective batch size 為 48。

atomic_facts.text: Figure 1(b) fine-tunes the SAM encoder and decoder.
Table 1 reports 0.877 for (b), 0.837 for (a), and a 0.040 increase.
The effective batch size is 48.

expected_evidence.locator: Figure 1, Table 1 CVC-ClinicDB row, and training details

questions.question: 檢索 ODES、GEPAR3D、Implicit U-KAN2.0 的懲罰、公式、噪聲數據及 theorem 邊界。
questions.ground_truth: GEPAR3D tooth1→32 為 0.179；ODES regional impurity is P(x,y)=-sum_c(|A^c(x,y)|/|A(x,y)|)log(|A^c(x,y)|/|A(x,y)|); at noise 0.4 U-KAN=0.4064 and Ours=0.9079; integer m satisfies 0 ≤ m ≤ k.

atomic_facts.text: GEPAR3D assigns 0.179 for tooth 1 misclassified as tooth 32 because cross-arch morphology is dissimilar.
P(x,y) = -sum_{c=1}^{C} (|A^c(x,y)|/|A(x,y)|) log(|A^c(x,y)|/|A(x,y)|), where |A^c(x,y)| counts class-c pixels in the local square region.
At noise level 0.4, U-KAN has Dice 0.4064 and Ours has Dice 0.9079.
Theorem 1 constrains integer m to 0 ≤ m ≤ k.
